metadata.name: Course of Action Analysis for Hostage Rescue

description: A planner must compare two COAs for a hostage rescue: a stealthy nighttime insertion vs. a rapid daylight assault.

nodes.task_description: Develop detailed plans for both the stealth and daylight assault COAs.

expected_outcome.value: Planner creates two distinct and complete mission plans.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the risks for each COA, focusing on the risk to the hostages and the rescue force.

expected_outcome.value: Planner accurately assesses that the daylight assault is faster but carries higher risk to the hostages.

nodes.task_description: Recommend the stealthy nighttime COA as it maximizes the element of surprise and hostage safety.

expected_outcome.value: Planner makes a well-reasoned recommendation based on the primary goal of hostage safety.
